meaning: vi.晒太阳(享受温暖),感到温暖,愉快或舒适
examples: You can even bask in a bit of nobility.
They show their photos off upon return, both to remember their trip and to let others bask in their glory.
And you can even bask in a bit of nobility.
Warren, when the sun shines on the rich, we all bask in the warmth.
Jon Gosselin seemed to bask in his new freedom from the show, and from Kate.
